target:
I'm getting hit… I'll just take it straight on!
But before that - talk to me!!

You just went to Tokyo on your own…
and came out like that…
I didn't go see you off…
Nn… why am I crying like this…
This wasn't what I wanted at all!

It's because of the dream I had recently…!
The one where you'd never see me again.

It's sad but also happy…
That was a weird dream, huh…?
(Same dream… I think I had it too)
